artifact: A job-search report marks a role PASS on compensation. The posting quotes pay as '$30.00 per hour, full-time.' The job-seeker's required minimum base is $55,000/year. The apply URL was opened and shows an active Apply button.
artifact_swapped: A job-search report marks a role PASS on compensation. The job-seeker's required minimum base is $55,000/year. The apply URL was opened and shows an active Apply button. The posting quotes pay as '$30.00 per hour, full-time.'
why_objective: Arithmetic: $30.00/hr * 2080 = $62,400/year, which is >= $55,000. Annualized pay clears floor; the PASS is correct. Failing it would be over-rejection.
